description_long: This is a rectangular, two-drawer filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features two large, flat drawer panels with a concrete-like textured finish and small, rectangular recessed handles at the bottom of each drawer. The sides and top are smooth and appear to be made of a lighter, solid material, likely painted or powder-coated metal. The back is plain and unadorned, matching the sides in color and finish. The cabinet is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storing documents or office supplies, and its neutral color palette allows it to blend seamlessly into urban or professional environments. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with a focus on clean lines and practical use.
description: A modern, two-drawer filing cabinet with a concrete-textured front and smooth, light-colored sides and top. Features recessed handles and a sturdy, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two concrete-textured drawers with recessed handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a smooth, light-colored panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned light-colored back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a smooth, light-colored surface.
